title: EXPRESSION AND PURIFICATION OF HUMAN p62 (HIS-TEV-mCherry-p62)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e8usi","text":"This protocol describes how to express and purify human p62 tagged N-terminally with HIS and TEV. The expression is performed with E. coli Rosetta pLysS cells. The protein is purified via a HisTrap column and gel filtration (SEC). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":131,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"5o79n","text":"E. coli Rosetta (DE3) pLysS cells","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1h69b","text":"LB medium with antibiotics: 50 μl/ml ampicillin and 34 μl/ml chloramphenicol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3dso3","text":"IPTG (Isopropyl-β-D-thiogalactopyranosid)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8v06g","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b8cid","text":"Columns/Resin:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":14}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ih8m","text":"HisTrap HP column, 1 x 5 ml (Cytiva, #17524802)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fvg1b","text":"Superdex 200 Increase 10/300 GL column (Cytiva, #28990946)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Grow E. coli Rosetta pLysS cells in 8 L Luria broth medium at 37 °C until an OD 600 nm of 0.8 is reached.
Induce protein expression with 150 micromolar (µM) IPTG for 05:00:00 at 25 °C .
Centrifuge cells at 3000 rcf, 4 °C , 00:15:00
Aspirate media and resuspend pellet in 10 mL Lysis Buffer
Flash freeze sample in liquid nitrogen
Store at -80 °C until use.
Thaw sample at 37 °C
Sonicate sample 5 cycles at 65% power for 00:00:30
Centrifuge sample 140,000 rcf at 4 °C for 00:30:00
Repeat sonication for a total of three times
Equilibrate a HisTrap HP column (GE Healthcare) with 5 column volumes of water and 5 of HisTrap Buffer A
During centrifugation perform equilibration
Filter the supernatant through 0.2 µm syringe filter
Load sample onto the equilibrated HisTrap column at 4 °C
Elute protein via a stepwise imidazole gradient using HisTrap Buffers A and B and elution steps: 25 mM, 62.5 mM, 118.75 mM, 148.75 mM, 212.mM, 306.25 mM and 400 mM imidazole
Add 100 µg to 150 µg TEV protease to pooled protein-containing fractions and incubate Overnight at 4 °C to cleave.
Concentrate resulting protein with a 30 kDa MWCO concentrator (Millipore) to between .5 mL and 1 mL
Apply protein to a Superdex 200 Increase 10/300 column (Cytiva) pre-equilibrated with SEC Buffer.
Freeze purified protein in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C
Protein purity can be determined by SDS PAGE analysis
creator: OLIVIA HARDING
